mnemonics: Thresholding is like sorting laundry: 'GRAY' clothes into 'BIN'aries (black OR white, no grays allowed).
keyPoints: Thresholding converts grayscale images to binary images
A global threshold value (T) is applied uniformly across the entire image
Pixels above T become white; pixels below T become black
commonMistakes: Choosing an arbitrary threshold value without analyzing the image histogram
Applying global thresholding to images with non-uniform lighting, causing poor segmentation
